Efficiency increases dramatically in high-stakes situations. Healing and strength become accessible tools.

Drawbacks emerge alongside utility. Public recognition limits anonymity completely. Rival factions hunt for weaknesses. Psychological strain builds rapidly. Moral weight presses heavily upon the heart. Privacy fades into memory quickly. Managing emotions becomes essential. Life shifts forever once activated.<|im_end|>

final_answer:
With great power comes great responsibility. Gaining supernatural powers offers significant benefits. Users can safeguard communities and prevent tragedies. Ordinary limitations vanish during crises. Efficiency increases dramatically in high-stakes situations. Healing and strength become accessible tools.

Drawbacks emerge alongside utility. Public recognition limits anonymity completely. Rival factions hunt for weaknesses. Psychological strain builds rapidly. Moral weight presses heavily upon the heart. Privacy fades into memory quickly. Managing emotions becomes essential. Life shifts forever once activated.<|im_end|>
